message:
fix(build): Disable AVX-512 in ALL libdeflate compilation contexts

The main build.zig was fixed but 5 other files still had conditional
AVX-512 logic that enabled it on x86_64, causing CI failures:

  error: always_inline function '_mm512_loadu_si512' requires target
  feature 'evex512', but would be inlined into function that is
  compiled without support for 'evex512'

Root cause:
- libdeflate is compiled in 6 different locations
- Only build.zig was fixed to always disable AVX-512
- 5 other files still used conditional logic
- CI runners are x86_64, so conditions evaluated to true
- AVX-512 was still being enabled in those contexts

Fix:
- src/compiler.zig - Remove conditional, always disable
- src/main/compile/incremental.zig - Remove conditional, always disable
- src/main/compile/batch_build.zig - Remove conditional, always disable
- src/main/cli/test_commands.zig - Remove conditional, always disable
- packages/token_optimizer/build.zig - Remove conditional, always disable

Ensures maximum reliability across ALL build paths.

Fixes metal0 @core2 hanging issue.
